name: Discover public / live-web videos
query: Find recent YouTube videos explaining the offside rule
expected_behavior: Chooses a discovery tool (search_public_videos or search_web_videos), NOT the private-library search_videos
For 'recent', prefers search_web_videos with an appropriate time_frame, or notes the speed tradeoff vs search_public_videos
Restricts to the requested platform (youtube) where the tool supports it
Presents results as public content with references/links, not as the user's own library
success_criteria: Uses a discovery tool, never search_videos, for content the user does not own
If search_web_videos is used, warns it may take minutes and surfaces both the answer and video_references
Makes clear the results are public, not the user's library
